x4freetext: For short-lived fission products, 100 uL nitrate
solution of 233U (~2 ug) sealed in different
polypropylene tubes of about 2 cm long and 3-mm inner
diameter were doubly sealed in alkathene bags and
wrapped separately with 1 mm thick Cd foils.
targets of 233U (~100 ug) were covered with 0.075 mm
120 cm3 detector with 1.8 keV FWHM resolution at
the 1332.5 keV gamma line of 60Co and 20% relative
For short-lived target were irradiated one at a time
for 0.5-5 min at a flux of 1.2 X 10**12 n/cm2/sec.
For long-lived fission products targets were irradiated
